import React from "react"; import reactDom from "react-dom"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter} from 'react-router-dom'; import './Design.css'; let gifts = [ { id : 1, Image :"Image 1", Name : "Gift Name 1", Price : " Gift Price 1", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 1" }, { id : 2, Image : "Image 2", Name : "Gift Name 2", Price : " Gift Price 2", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 2" }, { id : 3, Image : "Image 3", Name : "Gift Name 3", Price : " Gift Price 3", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 3" }, { id : 4, Image : "Image 4", Name : "Gift Name 4", Price : " Gift Price 4", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 4" }, { id : 5, Image : "Image 5", Name : "Gift Name 5", Price : " Gift Price 5", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 5" }, { id : 6, Image : "Image 6", Name : "Gift Name 6", Price : " Gift Price 6", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 6" } ] function addGifts(Gifts){ return <>
Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/addGIft" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout




< a className="padr1">Image Gift Name Price Quantity

{gifts.map(gifts => { return(
< div className="box" id = {gifts.id}> {gifts.Image} {gifts.Name} {gifts.Price} {gifts.Quantitiy} < Link to = "/editGIft" className="link">Edit < Link to = "/editGIft" className="link">Delete

) })}



Add Gifts



















} export default addGifts;
